# Kamino Summary

Kamino remains unaffected by Drift protocol compromise. The xStocksFi Market exceeded $25M in total market size, enabling borrowing against tokenized equities (SPYx, QQQx, TSLAx, NVDAx, GOOGLx, MSTRx). Galaxy (NASDAQ: GLXY) launched on Superstate Market, allowing investors to borrow USDC/CASH against tokenized public equity collateral on Solana.

tweets.fullText: Kamino can confirm that it has zero exposure to the Drift protocol compromise. Kamino users, across all products, including Vaults, Markets, and Multiply, are wholly unaffected.
tweets.aiAnalysis: The tweet's solid engagement (1.2% like rate, 7.6% retweet rate) was driven by **direct reassurance addressing immediate fear** — the specificity of naming zero exposure + listing all product lines gave users concrete proof of safety during a crisis moment, triggering relief-based sharing rather than panic-driven debate.
